nasb.text: This figure of speech Jesus spoke to them, but they did not understand what those things were which He had been saying to them.

esv.text: This figure of speech Jesus used with them, but they did not understand what he was saying to them.

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們說了這個譬喻，他們卻不明白他所說的是甚麼。

ccb.text: 耶稣讲了这个比喻，但听的人都不明白祂的意思。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说了这个比喻，他们却不明白他说的是什么。
